greeting.summary: You have {steps, plural, one {# step} other {# steps}} across {projects, plural, one {# project} other {# projects}}.
greeting.newUser: You’re all set up — now let’s find you something to work on. Tell us what you’re good at, and we’ll match you to projects that need exactly that.

skills.title: Add your skills
skills.description: Pick the things you’re good at — and want to use. Takes ~2 minutes.

project.title: Join your first project
project.description: Browse open projects, or claim a single step to start small.

pinned.title: The work you’re most involved in.
pinned.needHelp: {n, plural, one {# needs help} other {# need help}}
pinned.progressValue: {pct}% · {done} of {total, plural, one {# step} other {# steps}}
pinned.emptyTitle: Pin a project to keep it close.
pinned.emptyDescription: Once you join a project, pin it here for quick access. You can also browse what’s live right now and find one that fits.

nextSteps.title: Pick one, finish one.
nextSteps.viewAll: View all {n, plural, one {# step} other {# steps}}
nextSteps.emptyTitle: Your steps will show up here.
nextSteps.emptyDescription: Once you claim a step on a project, it’ll appear here so you can track what’s next. Even a 1-hour task counts.

matches.title: Projects that need you.
matches.emptyTitle: Add your skills to see matches.
matches.emptyDescription: We’ll line up projects looking for exactly what you bring. It’s also fine to pick skills you want to use, even if they’re not your day job.
